channel.title: How to use template part?
channel.description:
Hello, I just saw the JS for WP Conf Talk from @SantosGuillamot and was very excited about the possibility to load Gutenberg template-parts into Frontity.
So I tried to do the same… But it won’t work for me because we no longer have access to this api route without authenticating but I would still like to use this
https://rockusupport.com/wp-json/wp/v2/template-parts

item.title: How to use template part?
item.dc:creator: axelverglas
item.description:
Hello,
I just saw the JS for WP Conf Talk from @SantosGuillamot and was very excited about the possibility to load Gutenberg template-parts into Frontity.

So I tried to do the same… But it won’t work for me because we no longer have access to this api route without authenticating but I would still like to use this

https://rockusupport.com/wp-json/wp/v2/template-parts

Read full topic
